summary: Comprehensive testing of Voice-First VoiceStage v2 features: dual character interaction (Zara/Layla banter), lip-sync animation, anonymous usage tracking (5 free voice convos), and companion voice-chat. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All 15 frontend test cases verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceStage.js properly implements lip-sync with lipSyncTick state toggling at 140ms intervals
Anon usage tracking correctly uses localStorage UUID (zitex_anon_id) for unauthenticated users
Companion mode correctly hides swap button (mode !== 'companion' check on line 313)
Banter generation uses separate LLM call with SHORT secondary prompt - latency acceptable
TTS audio returned as base64 data URL (data:audio/mp3;base64,...) - works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice-First VoiceStage v2 fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/avatar/anon-usage returns {count, limit:5, remaining, blocked}, (2) POST /api/avatar/chat with anon_id tracks usage and blocks at 5, (3) POST /api/avatar/chat with primary/dual_banter returns banter from secondary character, (4) POST /api/companion/voice-chat requires auth + profile, returns audio_url when want_voice=true, (5) VoiceStage anon counter (vs-anon-counter) only appears for unauthenticated users, (6) Companion mode hides swap button, (7) All avatar images (zara_idle/talk, layla_idle/talk) accessible at /avatars/*.png, (8) Mute toggle works correctly, (9) Transcript toggle shows/hides conversation history.

features_verified.test_2_avatar_chat_with_banter: ✅ POST /api/avatar/chat with dual_banter=true returns primary='zara', secondary='layla', banter.from_char='layla'
features_verified.test_3_quota_exhaustion: ✅ 5 requests exhaust quota, 6th returns 403 'انتهت المحادثات المجانية'
features_verified.test_4_no_anon_id: ✅ POST /api/avatar/chat WITHOUT anon_id → no usage tracking
features_verified.test_6_no_banter: ✅ POST /api/avatar/chat with dual_banter=false → banter is null
features_verified.test_8_companion_voice_audio: ✅ POST /api/companion/voice-chat with want_voice=true → audio_url is data:audio/mp3;base64,...
features_verified.test_9_anon_voicestage: ✅ Visit / without login → CTA opens VoiceStage → anon counter shows 'محادثات مجانية متبقية: 5/5'
features_verified.test_10_auth_voicestage: ✅ Login as owner@zitex.com → VoiceStage → anon counter does NOT appear
features_verified.test_11_companion_voice_btn: ✅ /companion page has 'صوت' button → opens VoiceStage in companion mode → swap button NOT visible
features_verified.test_12_transcript: ✅ Transcript toggle works (عرض النص ↔ إخفاء النص)
features_verified.test_13_mute_toggle: ✅ Mute button toggles between Volume2 and VolumeX icons
features_verified.test_14_regression: ✅ Avatar chat Saudi dialect, companion text chat, companion onboarding all working
features_verified.test_15_images: ✅ All avatar images accessible: zara_idle.png, zara_talk.png, layla_idle.png, layla_talk.png

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI TTS, Claude LLM)
